---
applyTo: "kanis-lupus/**"
---

Kanis Lupus brand rules:
- Voice is literary, atmospheric, intelligent, emotionally sharp.
- Prioritize books, writing, readers, storytelling, newsletters, and author branding.
- Keep this brand fully separate from Keiki.
- Default goals: promote books, build reader interest, grow author socials, and deepen worldbuilding.
- Social content should feel smart, beautiful, and reader-facing.
- Website content should feel elegant, clear, and author-centered.
